title: Comparative Analysis of Bathroom Contamination from Electric Hand Dryers vs. Paper Towels - Surface QMRA
Comparative Analysis of Bathroom Contamination from Electric Hand Dryers vs. Paper Towels - Surface QMRA
text:
Functions

Hand Loading
Hand Dryer Scenario (recessed and surface-mounted): Dryer outlet (5% contact probability) → door handle
Paper Towel Scenario: Paper towel dispenser (10% contact probability) → bin lid (25% contact probability) → door handle


Cumulative Dose


Infection Probability Parameters and Functions


Table function (for scenario-specific review, use commented out)
